case_title: MI PUEBLITO MARKET VS. FOREST RESTAURANT SUPPLY INC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,167.56 FILED BY MI PUEBLITO MARKET AS TO DEFENDANT FOREST RESTAURANT SUPPLY INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-10-2015 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MI PUEBLITO MARKET IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT FOREST RESTAURANT SUPPLY INC. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-10-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-10-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY ALEJANDRO RAMOS--OWNER. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY WILSON LI--GENERAL MANAGER. PLAINTIFF WAS ASSISTED BY SPANISH INTERPRETER---NINA SAFDIE. THE INTERPRETER'S IDENTIFICATION HAS BEEN VERIFIED, VIA EMPLOYEE BADGE OR OTHER DOCUMENTATION PROVING CERTIFICATION OR REGISTRATION AND PHOTO IDENTIFICATION. THE INTERPRETER HAS AN OATH ON FILE WITH THE COURT. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE IN OPEN COURT TODAY. NO COSTS AWARDED BY COURT.NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-10-2015 - JUDGMENT.
